subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-06 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: As this dispensation is one of grace, those who perform goodly deeds and possess a righteous character will not be deprived of divine mercy
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون این ظهور ظهور فضل است لهذا کسانیکه اعمال طیبه و اخلاق حسنه دارند
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @goodly deeds; actions
